name: company-discovery-actor
title: Company Discovery from Job Aggregators
description: Discovers companies with open positions by scraping top job aggregator sites (Indeed, LinkedIn, Glassdoor, StepStone, Xing). Outputs company name, job board URL, and estimated open positions count.

maxCompaniesPerSource.title: Max companies per source
maxCompaniesPerSource.description: Maximum number of companies to discover from each job aggregator.

sources.title: Sources
sources.description: Which job aggregators to scrape. Options: indeed, linkedin, glassdoor, stepstone, xing

searchQueries.title: Search queries
searchQueries.description: Custom search queries to use across all sources. Leave empty for default industry terms.

useProxy.title: Use proxy
useProxy.description: Whether to use Apify residential proxy for requests.
